faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Larchmont?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Larchmont typically ranges from $350 to $2,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and number of colonies. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees before starting any treatment.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants or regular ants?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ants are larger than common household ants (up to ½ inch long), typically black or dark brown, and leave behind sawdust-like wood shavings called frass near damaged wood. You may also hear faint rustling sounds inside walls or woodwork where they're tunneling.

faqs.question: How long does carpenter ant treatment take?
faqs.answer: Initial treatment typically takes 1-2 hours depending on your property size and infestation severity. Most infestations require follow-up visits over 2-4 weeks to ensure complete colony elimination, as carpenter ants can have satellite nests that need targeted treatment.

faqs.question: Are carpenter ant treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and targeted application methods that are safe for your family and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We provide clear instructions on any necessary precautions and can schedule treatments at times most convenient for your household.
